name: interactive-storytelling-grid
description: An interactive storytelling grid exploring consciousness, reflection, and AI interaction

scripts.dev:clean: pkill -f 'node' 2>/dev/null || true && pkill -f 'vite' 2>/dev/null || true && sleep 2 && concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.test: cd frontend && npm test && cd ../backend && npm test
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.kill-all: pkill -f 'node' 2>/dev/null || true && pkill -f 'vite' 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'All processes killed'
scripts.db:install: brew install postgresql && brew services start postgresql
scripts.lang:setup: npm run db:init-config && npm run admin:init && npm run lang:init
scripts.custom:setup: npm run db:init-config && npm run admin:init && npm run custom:init
scripts.setup:full: npm run install:all && cd backend && npx prisma generate && cd .. && npm run db:setup && npm run custom:setup
